properties.displayName: Mimecast Security Events (via Codeless Connector Framework)

connectorUiConfig.title: Mimecast Security Events (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: Ingests Mimecast Secure Email Gateway, Targeted Threat Protection, DLP and Audit events into Microsoft Sentinel using Mimecast **Event Push** and the Codeless Connector Framework (Push). Mimecast posts events directly to the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API — no Mimecast credentials are stored in Sentinel.

sampleQueries.query:
MimecastEvents_CL
| summarize count() by mimecastEventType
| order by count_ desc

dataTypes.name: MimecastEvents_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
MimecastEvents_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

value:
MimecastEvents_CL
| summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
| project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(7d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: Mimecast Event Push
customs.description: Access to the Mimecast Administration Console (Integrations Hub) to configure an Event Push integration with OAuth 2.0 client credentials.

customs.name: Microsoft Entra ID
customs.description: Permission to create an application registration (performed automatically by the Deploy button below).

instructionSteps.title: 1. Deploy the ingestion resources
instructionSteps.description: This creates the Data Collection Endpoint, Data Collection Rule, custom table, and a Microsoft Entra application (with client secret) scoped to ingest into this connector's table only.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Configure Mimecast Event Push
instructionSteps.description:
In the Mimecast Administration Console, open **Integrations Hub -> Event Push** and create a destination with format **JSON** and OAuth 2.0 client credentials. Enter the values below.

- **Token endpoint**: the Microsoft Entra (v2.0) token endpoint for the Tenant ID below - the path is `/{Tenant ID}/oauth2/v2.0/token` on the Microsoft identity platform login endpoint ([documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/entra/identity-platform/v2-oauth2-client-creds-grant-flow))
- **Scope**: https://monitor.azure.com/.default
- **Destination URL**: {Data Collection Endpoint}/dataCollectionRules/{DCR Immutable ID}/streams/Custom-MimecastEvents_CL?api-version=2023-01-01

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend mimecastEventType = case( isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.auditType)), 'audit', isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.impersonationResults)), 'ttp_impersonation', tostring(mimecast_body.Logtype) == 'email_ttp_ap', 'email_ttp_ap', tostring(mimecast_body.Logtype) == 'seg_dlp', 'seg_dlp', isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.Logtype)), 'seg_cg', isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.fileHash)) or isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.sha256)), 'ttp_attachment', isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.url)), 'ttp_url', 'unknown') | extend _ts = case( isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.eventTime)), todatetime(tostring(mimecast_body.eventTime)), isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body['date'])), todatetime(tostring(mimecast_body['date'])), isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.timestamp)), datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(mimecast_body.timestamp) * 1ms, datetime(null)) | extend TimeGenerated = iff(isnull(_ts) or _ts < ago(2d) or _ts > now() + 10m, now(), _ts) | extend mimecastEventId = case( isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.id)), tostring(mimecast_body.id), isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.processingId)), tostring(mimecast_body.processingId), hash_sha256(strcat(tostring(mimecast_body.messageId), '|', tostring(mimecast_body.url), '|', tostring(mimecast_body['date']), '|', tostring(mimecast_body)))) | extend mimecastLogtype = tostring(mimecast_body.Logtype) | extend mimecastSubtype = tostring(mimecast_body.subtype) | project TimeGenerated, mimecastEventType, mimecastEventId, mimecastLogtype, mimecastSubtype, mimecast_body = tostring(mimecast_body)

properties.description: MimecastEvents Data Parser with template version 3.0.0

properties.query:
MimecastEvents_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)

MimecastEvents_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)

properties.description: MimecastCG Data Parser with template version 3.0.0

properties.query:
MimecastEvents_CL
| where mimecastEventType in ('seg_cg', 'email_ttp_ap')
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated,
    Logtype = tostring(d.Logtype), subtype = tostring(d.subtype),
    aggregateId = tostring(d.aggregateId), processingId = tostring(d.processingId),
    accountId = tostring(d.accountId), messageId = tostring(d.messageId),
    subject = tostring(d.subject), senderEnvelope = tostring(d.senderEnvelope),
    senderHeader = tostring(d.senderHeader), senderDomain = tostring(d.senderDomain),
    recipients = tostring(d.recipients), senderIp = tostring(d.senderIp),
    destinationIp = tostring(d.destinationIp), route = tostring(d.route),
    direction = tostring(d.direction), action = tostring(d.action),
    holdReason = tostring(d.holdReason), rejectionType = tostring(d.rejectionType),
    rejectionCode = tostring(d.rejectionCode), rejectionInfo = tostring(d.rejectionInfo),
    delivered = tostring(d.delivered), deliveryAttempts = tostring(d.deliveryAttempts),
    deliveryErrors = tostring(d.deliveryErrors), spamInfo = tostring(d.spamInfo),
    spamProcessingDetail = tostring(d.spamProcessingDetail),
    tlsUsed = tostring(d.tlsUsed), tlsVersion = tostring(d.tlsVersion), tlsCipher = tostring(d.tlsCipher),
    attachments = tostring(d.attachments), fileName = tostring(d.fileName),
    fileExtension = tostring(d.fileExtension), sha256 = tostring(d.sha256),
    sha1 = tostring(d.sha1), md5 = tostring(d.md5),
    virusFound = tostring(d.virusFound), urlCategory = tostring(d.urlCategory),
    scanResults = tostring(d.scanResults), emailSize = tostring(d.emailSize),
    numberAttachments = tostring(d.numberAttachments), Hostname = tostring(d.Hostname),
    internalUserName = tostring(d.internalUserName),
    taggedExternal = tostring(d.taggedExternal), taggedMalicious = tostring(d.taggedMalicious),
    timestamp = tostring(d.timestamp)

MimecastEvents_CL
| where mimecastEventType in ('seg_cg', 'email_ttp_ap')
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated,
    Logtype = tostring(d.Logtype), subtype = tostring(d.subtype),
    aggregateId = tostring(d.aggregateId), processingId = tostring(d.processingId),
    accountId = tostring(d.accountId), messageId = tostring(d.messageId),
    subject = tostring(d.subject), senderEnvelope = tostring(d.senderEnvelope),
    senderHeader = tostring(d.senderHeader), senderDomain = tostring(d.senderDomain),
    recipients = tostring(d.recipients), senderIp = tostring(d.senderIp),
    destinationIp = tostring(d.destinationIp), route = tostring(d.route),
    direction = tostring(d.direction), action = tostring(d.action),
    holdReason = tostring(d.holdReason), rejectionType = tostring(d.rejectionType),
    rejectionCode = tostring(d.rejectionCode), rejectionInfo = tostring(d.rejectionInfo),
    delivered = tostring(d.delivered), deliveryAttempts = tostring(d.deliveryAttempts),
    deliveryErrors = tostring(d.deliveryErrors), spamInfo = tostring(d.spamInfo),
    spamProcessingDetail = tostring(d.spamProcessingDetail),
    tlsUsed = tostring(d.tlsUsed), tlsVersion = tostring(d.tlsVersion), tlsCipher = tostring(d.tlsCipher),
    attachments = tostring(d.attachments), fileName = tostring(d.fileName),
    fileExtension = tostring(d.fileExtension), sha256 = tostring(d.sha256),
    sha1 = tostring(d.sha1), md5 = tostring(d.md5),
    virusFound = tostring(d.virusFound), urlCategory = tostring(d.urlCategory),
    scanResults = tostring(d.scanResults), emailSize = tostring(d.emailSize),
    numberAttachments = tostring(d.numberAttachments), Hostname = tostring(d.Hostname),
    internalUserName = tostring(d.internalUserName),
    taggedExternal = tostring(d.taggedExternal), taggedMalicious = tostring(d.taggedMalicious),
    timestamp = tostring(d.timestamp)

properties.description: MimecastAudit Data Parser with template version 3.0.0

properties.query:
MimecastEvents_CL
| where mimecastEventType == 'audit'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated,
    id = tostring(d.id), auditType = tostring(d.auditType),
    user = tostring(d.user), eventTime = todatetime(d.eventTime),
    eventInfo = tostring(d.eventInfo), category = tostring(d.category)

MimecastEvents_CL
| where mimecastEventType == 'audit'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated,
    id = tostring(d.id), auditType = tostring(d.auditType),
    user = tostring(d.user), eventTime = todatetime(d.eventTime),
    eventInfo = tostring(d.eventInfo), category = tostring(d.category)

properties.query:
MimecastEvents_CL
| where mimecastEventType == 'ttp_url'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated,
    Date = todatetime(d['date']), userEmailAddress = tostring(d.userEmailAddress),
    fromUserEmailAddress = tostring(d.fromUserEmailAddress), url = tostring(d.url),
    ttpDefinition = tostring(d.ttpDefinition), subject = tostring(d.subject),
    action = tostring(d.action), actions = tostring(d.actions),
    adminOverride = tostring(d.adminOverride), userOverride = tostring(d.userOverride),
    scanResult = tostring(d.scanResult), sendingIp = tostring(d.sendingIp),
    userAwarenessAction = tostring(d.userAwarenessAction), route = tostring(d.route),
    creationMethod = tostring(d.creationMethod),
    emailPartsDescription = tostring(d.emailPartsDescription),
    messageId = tostring(d.messageId), category = tostring(d.category)

MimecastEvents_CL
| where mimecastEventType == 'ttp_url'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated,
    Date = todatetime(d['date']), userEmailAddress = tostring(d.userEmailAddress),
    fromUserEmailAddress = tostring(d.fromUserEmailAddress), url = tostring(d.url),
    ttpDefinition = tostring(d.ttpDefinition), subject = tostring(d.subject),
    action = tostring(d.action), actions = tostring(d.actions),
    adminOverride = tostring(d.adminOverride), userOverride = tostring(d.userOverride),
    scanResult = tostring(d.scanResult), sendingIp = tostring(d.sendingIp),
    userAwarenessAction = tostring(d.userAwarenessAction), route = tostring(d.route),
    creationMethod = tostring(d.creationMethod),
    emailPartsDescription = tostring(d.emailPartsDescription),
    messageId = tostring(d.messageId), category = tostring(d.category)

properties.description: MimecastTTPImpersonation Data Parser with template version 3.0.0

properties.query:
MimecastEvents_CL
| where mimecastEventType == 'ttp_impersonation'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated,
    id = tostring(d.id), senderAddress = tostring(d.senderAddress),
    recipientAddress = tostring(d.recipientAddress), subject = tostring(d.subject),
    definition = tostring(d.definition), hits = toint(d.hits),
    identifiers = tostring(d.identifiers), action = tostring(d.action),
    taggedExternal = tobool(d.taggedExternal), taggedMalicious = tobool(d.taggedMalicious),
    senderIpAddress = tostring(d.senderIpAddress), eventTime = todatetime(d.eventTime),
    impersonationResults = todynamic(d.impersonationResults),
    messageId = tostring(d.messageId)
| mv-expand impersonationResult = impersonationResults
| extend impersonationDomainSource = tostring(impersonationResult.impersonationDomainSource),
         similarDomain = tostring(impersonationResult.similarDomain),
         checkerResult = tostring(impersonationResult.checkerResult)
| project-away impersonationResult

MimecastEvents_CL
| where mimecastEventType == 'ttp_impersonation'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated,
    id = tostring(d.id), senderAddress = tostring(d.senderAddress),
    recipientAddress = tostring(d.recipientAddress), subject = tostring(d.subject),
    definition = tostring(d.definition), hits = toint(d.hits),
    identifiers = tostring(d.identifiers), action = tostring(d.action),
    taggedExternal = tobool(d.taggedExternal), taggedMalicious = tobool(d.taggedMalicious),
    senderIpAddress = tostring(d.senderIpAddress), eventTime = todatetime(d.eventTime),
    impersonationResults = todynamic(d.impersonationResults),
    messageId = tostring(d.messageId)
| mv-expand impersonationResult = impersonationResults
| extend impersonationDomainSource = tostring(impersonationResult.impersonationDomainSource),
         similarDomain = tostring(impersonationResult.similarDomain),
         checkerResult = tostring(impersonationResult.checkerResult)
| project-away impersonationResult

properties.description: MimecastTTPAttachment Data Parser with template version 3.0.0

properties.query:
MimecastEvents_CL
| where mimecastEventType in ('email_ttp_ap', 'ttp_attachment')
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated,
    senderAddress = iff(isnotempty(tostring(d.senderAddress)), tostring(d.senderAddress), tostring(d.senderEnvelope)),
    recipientAddress = iff(isnotempty(tostring(d.recipientAddress)), tostring(d.recipientAddress), tostring(d.recipients)),
    fileName = tostring(d.fileName), fileType = tostring(d.fileType),
    fileExtension = tostring(d.fileExtension),
    fileHash = iff(isnotempty(tostring(d.fileHash)), tostring(d.fileHash), tostring(d.sha256)),
    sha1 = tostring(d.sha1), md5 = tostring(d.md5),
    result = iff(isnotempty(tostring(d.result)), tostring(d.result), tostring(d.scanResults)),
    actionTriggered = iff(isnotempty(tostring(d.actionTriggered)), tostring(d.actionTriggered), tostring(d.action)),
    definition = tostring(d.definition), details = tostring(d.details),
    subject = tostring(d.subject), route = tostring(d.route),
    messageId = tostring(d.messageId)

MimecastEvents_CL
| where mimecastEventType in ('email_ttp_ap', 'ttp_attachment')
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by mimecastEventId
| extend d = todynamic(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated,
    senderAddress = iff(isnotempty(tostring(d.senderAddress)), tostring(d.senderAddress), tostring(d.senderEnvelope)),
    recipientAddress = iff(isnotempty(tostring(d.recipientAddress)), tostring(d.recipientAddress), tostring(d.recipients)),
    fileName = tostring(d.fileName), fileType = tostring(d.fileType),
    fileExtension = tostring(d.fileExtension),
    fileHash = iff(isnotempty(tostring(d.fileHash)), tostring(d.fileHash), tostring(d.sha256)),
    sha1 = tostring(d.sha1), md5 = tostring(d.md5),
    result = iff(isnotempty(tostring(d.result)), tostring(d.result), tostring(d.scanResults)),
    actionTriggered = iff(isnotempty(tostring(d.actionTriggered)), tostring(d.actionTriggered), tostring(d.action)),
    definition = tostring(d.definition), details = tostring(d.details),
    subject = tostring(d.subject), route = tostring(d.route),
    messageId = tostring(d.messageId)

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The Mimecast Security Events (CCF) solution ingests Mimecast Secure Email Gateway, Targeted Threat Protection, DLP and Audit events into Microsoft Sentinel via Mimecast Event Push and the Codeless Connector Framework (Push). No Mimecast credentials are stored in Sentinel; Mimecast posts events to the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API using a Microsoft Entra application.

Data Connectors: 1, Parsers: 7

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
